creator: freebsd.tug890@passmail.net
text:
/net-p2p/qbittorrent-nox11
/net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar

Hi,
I updated net-p2p/qbittorrent-nox11 and /net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar from ports, to respective last versions 3.2.3 (qbittorrent) and 1.0.6 (libtorrent-rasterbar). I encounter an issue when starting qbittorrent-nox: 
---
Catching SIGSEGV, please report a bug at http://bug.qbittorrent.org
and provide the following backtrace:
qBittorrent version: v3.2.3
stack trace:

segmentation fault  qbittorrent-nox
---
# uname -a
FreeBSD sd-44877.local 10.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE #0 r286666: Wed Aug 12 15:26:37 UTC 2015     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

# Update from net-p2p/qbittorrent-nox11 v3.2.0 and /net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar v1.0.4

I can provide more information if needed.
Thank you for your support.

Alexandre
